member.summary: Keywords to counter operations.

member.summary: PatternConfig prefix.

member.summary: VectorsConfigured keyword for telemetry parameter.

member.summary: Counter keyword for telemetry parameter.

member.summary: Counter Category keyword for telemetry parameter.

member.summary: Counter List keyword for telemetry parameter.

member.summary: Counter Control SharedStorage key.

member.summary: Standard counter categories supported by Performance Counter.

member.summary: Functional counter category.

member.summary: Pattern Config counter category.

member.summary: Test Condition counter category.

member.summary: Dc Test counter category.

member.name: T:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterLists
member.summary: Lists of counters supported by Performance Counter.

member.name: T:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames
member.summary: Standard counter names that is available.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.Functional_Execute
member.summary: Counters for when Functional test is executed.

member.summary: Counters for when Pin Mask is set.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.Functional_PinMaskRestore
member.summary: Counters for when Pin Mask is restored.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.PatternConfig_PvcData
member.summary: Counters for when Pattern is configured with PVC data.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.PatternConfig_PinData
member.summary: Counters for when Pattern is configured with Pin data.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.PatternConfig_InstructionData
member.summary: Counters for when Pattern is configured with Instruction data.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.TestCondition_LevelsSetup
member.summary: Counter for when Test Condition SmartTc Category Levels Setup is being executed.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.TestCondition_LevelsPowerOn
member.summary: Counter for when Test Condition SmartTc Category Levels Power On is being executed.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.TestCondition_Timing
member.summary: Counter for when Test Condition SmartTc Category Timing is being executed.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.TestCondition_NotSupported
member.summary: Counter for when Test Condition SmartTc Category that's not supported is being called.

member.name: F:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Constants.StandardCounterNames.DcTest_LoadLevel
member.summary: Counters for when DcTest Load Level.

member.summary: To hold the counter control.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Control.CounterControlStorage.GlobalCounterEnable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the counter is enabled or not.

member.name: P:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Control.CounterControlStorage.InstanceCounterEnable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the counter is enabled on instance level or not.

member.name: P:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.Control.CounterControlStorage.IsCountThisSample
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this sample need to be counted.

member.summary: Calculate the sampling of this instance.
member.param: The sample rate set by user.

member.summary: Debug helper class.

member.summary: Print message for debug. Only compiled in Debug configuration.

member.summary: Print telemetry data for debug. Only compiled in Debug configuration.

member.summary: Print message for debug to HdmtApp console.. Only compiled in Debug configuration.

member.summary: Print message for debug to TOS console.

member.summary: Performance Counters.

member.summary: Get the global counter data for datalog.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Dictionary of counter name as key and the counter data is the values.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.IPerformanceCounterService.GetInstanceCounterDataForDatalog(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the instance counter data for datalog.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Dictionary of counter name and instance name as key and the counter data is the values.

member.summary: Setup the counters for operation.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Gets the counter processor queue.

member.summary: Add the counter processor into the queue.
member.param: The duration to accumulate into the counter.

member.name: T:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.TelemetryProvider.CounterCallProcessor
member.summary: Static class that process the counter calls.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.TelemetryProvider.CounterCallProcessor.ProcessGlobalCounterCall(PerformanceCounterService.Storage,System.TimeSpan,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Process the global counter call by handler.
member.param: The duration to accumulate into the counter.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.TelemetryProvider.CounterCallProcessor.ProcessInstanceCounterCall(PerformanceCounterService.Storage,System.TimeSpan,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Process the global counter call by handler.
member.param: The duration to accumulate into the counter.

member.name: T:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.TelemetryProvider.CounterTelemetryHandler`1
member.summary: Telemetry Handler for Counter.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.TelemetryProvider.CounterTelemetryHandler`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.TelemetryProvider.CounterTelemetryHandler`1.LogCounter(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns telemetry performance scope object to be used within a using block for counter usage. This counter will trigger Pattern Configuration counter. If method name is not provided, the compiler will provide the calling method name. Additional parameters can be provided as a func of Dictionary. For performance, always use a static literals for this API.
member.returns: IDisposable object that measure the block performance.

member.name: M:Prime.PerformanceCounterService.TelemetryProvider.CounterTelemetryHandler`1.LogCounter(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns telemetry performance scope object to be used within a using block for counter usage. This counter will trigger Pattern Configuration counter. If method name is not provided, the compiler will provide the calling method name. Additional parameters can be provided as a func of Dictionary. For performance, always use a static literals for this API.
member.param: The number of vectors being configured by PatternConfig.
member.returns: IDisposable object that measure the block performance.

member.name: T:PerformanceCounterService.Storage
member.summary: Performance Counter storage object.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:PerformanceCounterService.Storage.SupportedGlobalCounters
member.summary: Gets the supported global counters list.

member.name: P:PerformanceCounterService.Storage.SupportedInstanceCounters
member.summary: Gets the supported instance counters list.

member.name: M:PerformanceCounterService.Storage.GetGlobalLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a global object by session.

member.name: M:PerformanceCounterService.Storage.GetInstanceLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get an instance object by session.

member.name: M:PerformanceCounterService.Storage.GetGlobalCounters(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get global counter DB by session.
member.returns: Global counters DB for this session.

member.name: M:PerformanceCounterService.Storage.GetInstanceCounters(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get instance counter DB by session.
member.returns: Instance counters DB for this session.
